creator: antumdeluge@gmail.com
text:
It sounded like you only wanted the output of the "bt" command, so that is all that I've included. When I executed gdb there was a bunch of output about linked libraries saying "no debugging symbols found", but, if I understand correctly you don't want me to paste that.

(gdb) bt
#0  0x0000000000000000 in ?? ()
#1  0x0000000802624cef in ?? () from /usr/local/lib/gcc48/libstdc++.so.6
#2  0x00000008028d0200 in ?? () from /usr/local/lib/gcc48/libstdc++.so.6
#3  0x00007fffffffc920 in ?? ()
#4  0x0000000000000000 in ?? ()
